description: Healthchecker API for monitoring the health of the service.
steps: Create a new endpoint /health that returns the status of the service.
Implement a health check function that verifies the database connection and other critical dependencies.
Return a JSON response with the status of the service (e.g., { 'status': 'ok' }) and appropriate HTTP status codes (200 for healthy, 503 for unhealthy).
Write unit tests for the health check function to ensure it correctly identifies healthy and unhealthy states.
Document the API endpoint and its expected responses in the API documentation using Swagger UI.

description: Connection to feed player stats to the frontend in real-time.
steps: Please Review the websocket implementation in service/NodeService/routes/Player.js as a reference, but we want to implement a standalone in our JavaService.
Establish a WebSocket connection between the server and the frontend to enable real-time communication.
Implement a mechanism to broadcast player stats updates to all connected clients.
Handle client subscriptions and unsubscriptions to specific player stats.
Ensure the WebSocket connection is secure and handles reconnections gracefully.
Write unit tests for the WebSocket API to ensure it correctly broadcasts updates and handles client connections.
